Source: OpenAI Python SDK Releases
URL: https://github.com/openai/openai-python/releases
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# OpenAI Python SDK Releases

## v2.29.0 (March 17, 2026)
- Added support for 5.4 nano and mini model slugs
- Extended batches create method to include /v1/videos endpoint
- Introduced defer_loading field to ToolFunction
- Added in and nin operators to ComparisonFilter type
- Fixed dependency issues and Pydantic by_alias serialization

## v2.28.0 (March 13, 2026)
- Implemented custom voices feature for audio generation

## v2.27.0 (March 13, 2026)
- Released Sora API improvements including character API
- Added video extensions, edits, and higher resolution exports
- Repaired merged videos resource
- Multiple codegen updates and protocol improvements

## v2.26.0 (March 5, 2026)
- Migrated ComputerTool to GA status (general availability)
- Deprecated computer_use_preview tool in favor of ComputerUsePreview class

## v2.25.0 (March 5, 2026)
- Launched GPT-5.4 and tool search functionality
- Introduced new computer tool capability
- Removed prompt_cache_key parameter from responses

## v2.24.0 (February 24, 2026)
- Added phase field to message types
- Fixed phase enum handling

## v2.23.0 (February 24, 2026)
- Added gpt-realtime-1.5 and gpt-audio-1.5 model options

## v2.22.0 (February 23, 2026)
- Implemented WebSocket support for responses API
- Enhanced documentation for audio, chat, realtime, and video APIs

## v2.21.0 (February 13, 2026)
- Added container network policy and skills support
- Resolved memory leak in structured outputs parse methods

## v2.20.0 (February 10, 2026)
- Introduced image support in batch API
